mapper.select: select user_id, avatar_url, nickname, gender, grade, college, major, interest_tags, bio, real_name, verified, verify_status from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select account from user_account where user_id = #{userId} and enabled = 1 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_profile (user_id, avatar_url, nickname, gender, grade, college, major, interest_tags, bio, real_name, verified, verify_status) values (#{userId}, #{avatarUrl}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{grade}, #{college}, #{major}, #{interestTags}, #{bio}, #{realName}, 0, 'unverified')
mapper.update: update user_profile set avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, grade = #{grade}, college = #{college}, major = #{major}, interest_tags = #{interestTags}, bio = #{bio} where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select title, description, action_text from profile_campus_verify where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select label, icon, score, tone from profile_preference where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
select activity_score as score, percentile from profile_activity_summary where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select day_label as day, activity_value as value from profile_activity_bar where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
select status_label as status, credit_score, safety_level from profile_safety where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select item_text from profile_safety_item where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
select avatar_text as avatar, display_name as name, tag, message, display_time as time, unread_count as unread, tone from profile_recent_chat where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
select short_label, title, tag, period, description, location, display_time as time, matched_count as matched, tone from profile_publish where user_id = #{userId} order by sort_weight, id
